1.title: Pool size
1.query:
timeseries pool_size = avg(dt.runtime.websphere.threadpool.pool_size, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance, pool }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(pool_size) desc
| limit 10

2.title: Active threads
2.query:
timeseries active_threads = avg(dt.runtime.websphere.threadpool.active_threads, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance, pool }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(active_threads) desc
| limit 10

3.title: Number of waiting threads
3.query:
timeseries concurrent_waiters = avg(dt.runtime.websphere.connectionpool.concurrent_waiters, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance, pool }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(concurrent_waiters) desc
| limit 10

5.title: Pool size
5.query:
timeseries pool_size = avg(dt.runtime.websphere.connectionpool.pool_size, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance, pool }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(pool_size) desc
| limit 10

6.title: Free pool size
6.query:
timeseries free_pool_size = avg(dt.runtime.websphere.connectionpool.free_pool_size, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance, pool }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(free_pool_size) desc
| limit 10

7.title: Percent used
7.query:
timeseries percent_used = avg(dt.runtime.websphere.connectionpool.percent_used, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance, pool }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(percent_used) desc
| limit 10

8.title: In use time
8.query:
timeseries in_use_time = avg(dt.runtime.websphere.connectionpool.in_use_time, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance, pool }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(in_use_time) desc
| limit 10

9.title: Wait time
9.query:
timeseries wait_time = avg(dt.runtime.websphere.connectionpool.wait_time, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance, pool }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(wait_time) desc
| limit 10

10.title: Number of requests
10.query:
timeseries requests = avg(dt.runtime.websphere.servlet.requests, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance, app }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(requests) desc
| limit 10

11.title: Live sessions
11.query:
timeseries live_sessions = avg(dt.runtime.websphere.servlet.live_sessions, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance, app }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(live_sessions) desc
| limit 10
